description: This week's Solana changelog discusses recent developments including programmable smart wallets and improvements to RPC efficiency. Key highlights include the SRFC0009 proposal for signing in with programmable wallets using off-chain delegates, and a new method to access the leader schedule for upcoming epochs. Additionally, resources for building games with Clockwork and the Light RPC by Mango Markets are introduced.
topic_summary: The changelog covers updates from the core community call, focusing on SRFC0009 for programmable wallets [t=75.34], optimistic restart automation [t=51.16], and enhancements to RPC infrastructure [t=347.0].
